zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thomas d'Arcy II於1143年出生在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓時，他的父親Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton25歲，母親Mrs Thomas d'Arcy21歲。他於1165年與Lady Adelicia Deincourt在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1180年7月9日在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Thomas d'Arcy II于1143年出生在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓时，他的父亲Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton25岁，母亲Mrs Thomas d'Arcy21岁。他于1165年与Lady Adelicia Deincourt在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1180年7月9日在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thomas d'Arcy II was born in 1143, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton, was 25 and his mother, Mrs Thomas d'Arcy, was 21. He married Lady Adelicia Deincourt in 1165, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 9 July 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thomas d'Arcy II est né en 1143, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas d'Arcy, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Adelicia Deincourt en 1165, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Thomas d'Arcy II 1143 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton 25 und seine Mutter Mrs Thomas d'Arcy 21. Er hat 1165 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Adelicia Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juli 1180 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas d'Arcy II è nato il nel 1143 nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Thomas d'Arcy, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Adelicia Deincourt nel 1165, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 9 luglio 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas d'Arcy IIが1143年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた時，父Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Noctonは25歳，母Mrs Thomas d'Arcyは21歳であった。1165年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでLady Adelicia Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1180年7月9日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas d'Arcy II(이)가 1143년 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Thomas d'Arcy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Lady Adelicia Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 7월 9일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas d'Arcy II nasceu em 1143, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas d'Arcy, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Adelicia Deincourt em 1165, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de julho de 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thomas d'Arcy II родился в 1143 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas d'Arcy, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Adelicia Deincourt в 1165 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 9 июля 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Thomas d'Arcy II nació en 1143, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas d'Arcy I, Lord of Nocton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs Thomas d'Arcy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Adelicia Deincourt en 1165, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 9 de julio de 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
